mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, name, images, category_id, category, description, material, color, size, model, style, price, stock, spot_stock, presale_cycle_days, custom_cycle_days, min_order_quantity, delivery_areas, package_info, support_installation, status, review_status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_products (supplier_id, name, images, category_id, category, description, material, color, size, model, style, price, stock, spot_stock, presale_cycle_days, custom_cycle_days, min_order_quantity, delivery_areas, package_info, support_installation, status, review_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{images, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{material, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{color, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{size, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{model, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{style, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{stock, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{spotStock, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{presaleCycleDays, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customCycleDays, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{minOrderQuantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deliveryAreas, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packageInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supportInstallation, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO supplier_products (supplier_id, name, images, category_id, category, description, material, color, size, model, style, price, stock, spot_stock, presale_cycle_days, custom_cycle_days, min_order_quantity, delivery_areas, package_info, support_installation, status, review_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.images, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.categoryId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.material, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.color, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.size, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.model, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.style, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.price, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.stock, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.spotStock, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.presaleCycleDays, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.customCycleDays, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.minOrderQuantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.deliveryAreas, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.packageInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.supportInstallation, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.reviewStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_products WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM supplier_products WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier_products SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE supplier_products SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_products WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 'active' AND review_status = 'approved' AND stock > 0

SELECT MIN(category_id) AS id, category AS name, category AS icon, COUNT(1) AS product_count FROM supplier_products WHERE status = 'active' AND review_status = 'approved' AND stock > 0 AND category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' GROUP BY category ORDER BY product_count DESC, name ASC

SELECT p.* FROM supplier_products p LEFT JOIN supplier_product_metrics m ON m.product_id = p.id WHERE p.status = 'active' AND p.review_status = 'approved' AND p.stock > 0 ORDER BY COALESCE(m.orders, 0) DESC, COALESCE(m.sales_amount, 0) DESC, p.updated_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier_products SET stock = stock - #{quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, spot_stock = CASE WHEN spot_stock >= #{quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER} THEN spot_stock - #{quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER} ELSE spot_stock END WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND stock >= #{quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND status = 'active' AND review_status = 'approved'
